message:
test(conformance): add ctype_ops and dirent_ops conformance test harnesses

Add dedicated conformance test suites for two more fixture families:

- ctype_ops_conformance_test.rs (18 tests): validates ctype_ops.json
  covering all classification functions (isalpha, isdigit, isalnum,
  isupper, islower, isspace, isprint, ispunct, isxdigit) and conversion
  functions (tolower, toupper) with boundary value validation

- dirent_ops_conformance_test.rs (11 tests): validates dirent_ops.json
  covering opendir, readdir, closedir with both strict/hardened modes
  and ENOENT error path coverage

Each harness validates fixture schema, coverage patterns, error codes,
function distribution, mode validity, and case count stability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
